author: gb9t
content: Iter 124 result: net/bridge/br_input.md (Linux bridge ingress path - br_input.c ~485 lines; per-port br_handle_frame rx_handler from __netif_receive_skb + per-skb classify link-local MAC (BPDU/PAUSE/LLDP) vs unicast/multicast vs broadcast + per-port STP-state gate (DISABLED/BLOCKING/LISTENING/LEARNING/FORWARDING) + br_handle_frame_finish post-NF_BR_PRE_ROUTING + br_fdb_update src-MAC learning + br_fdb_find_rcu dst-MAC lookup + br_forward known-unicast OR br_flood unknown-unicast/multicast/broadcast + br_pass_frame_up local-MAC up-pass to br0 + br_multicast_rcv IGMP/MLD snooping + br_handle_ingress_vlan_tunnel + per-VLAN-aware allowed-vid filtering). NOTE: DCCP not in mainline 7.x; pivoted to bridge. + virt/kvm/x86-pml.md (Intel Page-Modification-Logging - vmx.c PML subset ~150 lines; per-vCPU 4KB pml_pg buffer 512 entries x 8B GPA + vmcs.PML_ADDRESS + PML_INDEX wraps 0x1FF→0xFFFF + HW pushes GPA on EPT-WP-page write A+D-bit-set + PML_FULL vmexit on wrap + vmx_flush_pml_buffer per-vmexit walks entries → kvm_vcpu_mark_page_dirty + ENABLE_PML secondary control gated by enable_pml module-param + nr_memslots_dirty_logging > 0 + Broadwell+ HW dirty-tracking for live-migration). 198 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/8021q/vlan.md (VLAN driver) + virt/kvm/x86-vmwrite-vmread.md or pivot.
